title: US 27 Interchange Project Moving Forward
summary: Major interchange improvements at US 27 and CR 546 will enhance safety and reduce congestion.

title: Texas Roadhouse Coming to Auburndale
summary: Popular steakhouse chain breaks ground on a new location. Opening expected in late 2025.

title: New Apartment Community Approved in Lakeland
summary: City approves a 300-unit luxury apartment community near Lakeside Village.

title: Holiday Inn Express Coming to Winter Haven
summary: New 100-room hotel to be built near Legoland. Construction starts this summer.
